name: qualimetry-ai
description: Qualimetry AI App: enforces coding standards, principles, policies, and surfaces AI review and rules-based analysis findings inside OpenAI Codex.

plugins.name: qualimetry-ai-app
plugins.description: Bundles the Qualimetry skills, a PostToolUse hook that surfaces review findings the moment a reviewed file is opened, and the qualimetry-setup workflow for registering the Qualimetry MCP server.
